## RawNode class

An AST node containing an unescaped regular expression source.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RawNode extends RegexNode 
```
**Extends:** [RegexNode](./pattern-builder.regexnode.md)

## Example


```ts
new RawNode(/[a-z]+/i).toString(); // "[a-z]+"
```
